title: Protocol: CRISPR-based Gene Deletion in Nostoc punctiforme - Overview

steps: In silico design of primers and gRNA arrays to construct pCpf1b vectors for deletion of target genes
In silico design of primers to confirm gene deletion

creator: Douglas Risser
